# Zanna Diagnostics Runtime Reference

[Back to the runtime reference index](README.md)

## Classes

<a id="zanna-diagnostics"></a>
### `Zanna.Diagnostics`

Provides Diagnostics functionality for diagnostics and observability.

`Zanna.Diagnostics` exposes a registry-backed runtime surface without requiring callers to
construct the class directly. Its public surface exposes operations including `CurrentTrap`.

#### Methods

| Method | Signature | Runtime target |
|---|---|---|
| <a id="zanna-diagnostics-currenttrap"></a>`CurrentTrap` | `obj<Zanna.Option>()` | `Zanna.Diagnostics.CurrentTrap` |

<a id="zanna-diagnostics-trapinfo"></a>
### `Zanna.Diagnostics.TrapInfo`

Provides Trap Info functionality for diagnostics and observability.

`Zanna.Diagnostics.TrapInfo` exposes a registry-backed runtime surface without requiring callers
to construct the class directly. Its public surface exposes properties such as `Kind`, `Code`,
`Ip`.

<a id="zanna-diagnostics-log"></a>
### `Zanna.Diagnostics.Log`

Provides simple logging utilities.

`Zanna.Diagnostics.Log` exposes a registry-backed runtime surface without requiring callers to
construct the class directly. Its public surface exposes properties such as `Level`,
`LevelDebug`, `LevelInfo` and operations including `Debug`, `Info`, `Warn`, `Error`.

|---|---|---|
| <a id="zanna-diagnostics-log-level"></a>`Level` | `i64` | read/write |

| <a id="zanna-diagnostics-log-levelinfo"></a>`LevelInfo` | `i64` | read-only |
| <a id="zanna-diagnostics-log-levelwarn"></a>`LevelWarn` | `i64` | read-only |
